title: pilosella hypeurya subsp. hanhartii
intro: Pilosella hypeurya subsp. hanhartii, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pilosella hypeurya subsp. hanhartii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, which can be used as a topical treatment or taken as a tincture.
